title: 电商促销大字报主图
prompt_template: A bold promotional e-commerce main image for {product_name}. Top section: massive condensed bold sans-serif headline reading "{promo_headline}" in {accent_color_hex} on a high-contrast background. Center: {product_name} with dramatic studio lighting and subtle glow effect. Bottom strip: 3 short benefit tags ({benefit_1} / {benefit_2} / {benefit_3}) in pill-shaped badges. Style: high-energy direct response advertising, vibrant saturated colors, sharp readable typography, premium e-commerce listing aesthetic, 1024x1024.
